scripts.dev:studio: concurrently -n player,api -c cyan,yellow "npm run dev:studio-player" "npm run dev:studio-api"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n teacher,server,student -c blue,green,magenta "npm run dev:teacher" "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:student"
scripts.test:studio: npm run test -w @classroom-widgets/widget-spec && npm run test -w @classroom-widgets/widget-player && npm run test -w @classroom-widgets/studio-api
scripts.verify:studio: npm run test:studio && npm run typecheck -w @classroom-widgets/widget-spec && npm run build -w @classroom-widgets/widget-player && npm run typecheck -w @classroom-widgets/studio-api && npm run eval:widget-spec && npm run verify:studio-resources
scripts.ipad:prepare: npm run build -w @classroom-widgets/widget-player && node scripts/sync-widget-player-to-ipad.mjs && node scripts/sync-studio-examples-to-ipad.mjs && npm run ipad:generate
